name: PH Molds
message: PH Molds Limited is a leading provider of custom plastic injection mold design and manufacturing in Metro Vancouver, BC. The company offers a wide range of services, including part and product manufacturing, assembly, and value-added services, helping clients to create complex and functional designs.We are ready to upload 35gb of corporate data. Full personal information of employees, their relatives and family friends (passport applications contain name, DOB, current address, email, phone, passport number, passport scan, emergency contacts information, health information), agreements and contracts, financials, credit card information, NDAs, etc.
